description: Sent to admins when an idea successfully transitions from one stage to the next
subject: [G42 SaaS Factory] {{idea_name}} — Moved to {{current_stage}}
body:
Stage Transition: {{previous_stage}} → {{current_stage}}

An idea has passed the gate review and moved to the next stage.

Idea{{idea_name}}
Previous Stage{{previous_stage}}
Current Stage{{current_stage}}
Business Unit{{business_unit}}
Submitted By{{submitter_name}} ({{submitter_email}})

A new checklist has been posted on the issue for the {{current_stage}} stage.

View Idea on GitHub

You are receiving this because you are an admin on the G42 SaaS Factory Board.
